### Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature causing existing functionality to break)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / technical debt
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement
- [ ] 🏗 Infrastructure / DevOps

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass locally
- [ ] Tested with real RFP upload (local only — DO NOT push RFP data)

- [ ] WebSocket telemetry verified

### Security Checklist
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or credentials in code
- [ ] No client data, RFP content, or PII in commits
- [ ] Input validation maintained
- [ ] Auth/RBAC requirements preserved
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed for known vulnerabilities
